title: Monday Doc: templates vs instance
excerpt: Currently MondayDocs are considered “templates”. These templates can be instantiated in a column on a deal. This instance can then be edited however that current actual behavior is for that edit to apply to all instances…

posts.author: NoahM (Noah)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently MondayDocs are considered “templates”. These templates can be instantiated in a column on a deal. This instance can then be edited however that current actual behavior is for that edit to apply to all instances including the template. This behavior entirely defeats the purpose of having templates. File instances generated from a template should be isolated to the given instance and not effect every instance and origin template.
